title: eleocharis calva var. australis
intro: Eleocharis calva var. australis, also known as bald spike-rush or naked spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis calva var. australis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its ability to support immune function. Eleocharis calva var. australis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
